/usr/sbin/g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/export-graph-ops.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/export-graph-ops.dir/export-graph-ops.cpp.o" -o ../bin/export-graph-ops  -Wl,-rpath,/home/milo/projects/go-llama.cpp/build/bin: ../common/libcommon.a libgguf-model-data.a ../common/libcommon.a ../bin/libllama.so.0.0.8797 ../bin/libggml.so.0.9.11 ../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.11 ../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.11 ../vendor/cpp-httplib/libcpp-httplib.a /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so
